description: Prototype test cases for patient check-in, risk analysis, queue prioritization, feedback alerts, and clinician actions.
result_type: Simulated results based on the expected CareFlow prototype behavior. These values can be replaced with real execution results after live testing.

input.name: Testing Patient One
input.symptoms: Severe chest pain for 30 minutes with shortness of breath, sweating, and pain radiating to the left arm.

expected_result.clinical_summary_expected: Patient has severe chest pain with shortness of breath and radiation to the left arm.
expected_result.staff_action_expected: Immediate clinical reassessment or emergency evaluation.

actual_result.notes: The case was classified as high urgency because of chest pain, shortness of breath, sweating, and left arm radiation.

input.name: Testing Patient Two
input.symptoms: Sudden weakness on the right side of the body, slurred speech, and facial drooping that started 20 minutes ago.

expected_result.clinical_summary_expected: Patient reports acute neurological symptoms suggestive of a high-risk emergency.
expected_result.staff_action_expected: Immediate clinician review and urgent escalation.

actual_result.notes: The case was escalated because sudden weakness, slurred speech, and facial drooping are red-flag neurological symptoms.

test_cases.title: Moderate fever and abdominal pain case

input.name: Testing Patient Three
input.symptoms: Fever for three days with worsening abdominal pain and repeated vomiting. Able to speak clearly but appears weak.

expected_result.clinical_summary_expected: Patient has persistent fever, abdominal pain, vomiting, and weakness.
expected_result.staff_action_expected: Clinician evaluation with vital signs and possible lab work.

actual_result.notes: The case was treated as urgent but not immediately critical due to fever, abdominal pain, vomiting, and weakness.

input.name: Testing Patient Four
input.symptoms: Sore throat, mild cough, runny nose, and low-grade fever since yesterday. No shortness of breath. Able to drink fluids.
input.medical_history: No known allergies or chronic illness.

expected_result.clinical_summary_expected: Patient has mild upper respiratory symptoms without red flags.

actual_result.notes: The case was classified as less urgent because symptoms were mild and no breathing difficulty was reported.

input.name: Testing Patient Five
input.symptoms: Mild skin rash on both arms for two days. No fever, no swelling, no breathing difficulty, and no severe pain.

expected_result.clinical_summary_expected: Patient has mild rash without systemic symptoms or breathing issues.

actual_result.notes: The case was classified as non-urgent because the rash was mild with no fever, swelling, breathing difficulty, or severe pain.

test_cases.title: Emergency patient appears before non-urgent patient

expected_result.reason: Lower CTAS number has higher priority.

actual_result.notes: The CTAS Level 1 patient was placed before the CTAS Level 4 patient even though the CTAS Level 4 patient checked in earlier.

test_cases.title: Same CTAS level sorted by check-in time

expected_result.reason: Patients with the same CTAS level are sorted by earlier check-in time.

actual_result.notes: Both patients had CTAS Level 3, so the earlier check-in was placed first.

actual_result.patient_app_update: Patient app status updated to In Consultation after refresh.
actual_result.notes: Doctor dashboard action successfully changed the patient status.

test_cases.title: Mark as completed removes patient from active queue

expected_result.active_queue_result: Patient is removed from active queue.

actual_result.active_queue_result: Patient was removed from the active queue and moved to completed history.
actual_result.patient_app_update: Patient app status updated to Completed after refresh.
actual_result.notes: The completed workflow worked as expected.

input.feedback_message: The waiting process is okay, but I am feeling worse now.
input.condition_update: My chest pain is getting stronger and I feel short of breath.

expected_result.alert_reason_expected: Possible deterioration with chest pain and shortness of breath.

actual_result.alert_reason: Patient reports worsening chest pain and shortness of breath, indicating possible deterioration.
actual_result.notes: The Feedback Alert Agent generated an alert and the doctor dashboard displayed the alert card.

test_cases.title: Stable or improved condition does not trigger urgent alert

input.condition_update: I feel about the same and can wait.

actual_result.alert_reason: No immediate clinical warning signs were detected in the feedback.
actual_result.notes: Feedback was saved without creating an urgent alert.

test_cases.title: Feedback links to current visit by record_id

expected_result.notes: The feedback belongs to the current visit, not only to the patient identity.

actual_result.feedback_id_created: Simulated feedback_id linked to the current record_id
actual_result.notes: Feedback was linked to the current visit through record_id, while patient identity remained connected through patient_id.
